titles.title: La La La De Ma Xiya

data.title: Lalala Demacia
title_synonyms: La La La De Ma Xiya
data.synopsis: The script draws on various game culture that players enjoy in the game League of Legends, and uses a humorous, light-hearted and funny story style to realistically restore the fun and battle life of League of Legends players in the game.
data.background: Based on the online game League of Legends.

data.title: Lalala Demacia 2nd Season
data.title_japanese: 啦啦啦德玛西亚 第二季
title_synonyms: La La La De Ma Xiya 2nd Season
data.synopsis:
The script draws inspiration from various aspects of the game's culture that players enjoy, using a humorous, lighthearted, and entertaining style to realistically portray the fun and competitive life of League of Legends players.

(Source: Bangumi, translated)
data.background: Based on the online game League of Legends.

titles.title: La La La De Ma Xiya 3rd Season

data.title: Lalala Demacia 3rd Season
data.title_japanese: 啦啦啦德玛西亚 第三季
title_synonyms: La La La De Ma Xiya 3rd Season
data.synopsis:
The third season's script structure brings many surprises. While maintaining the lighthearted and hilarious style of the first season, the content will focus on the competitive elements that players love, creating a new season of hilarious competitive gameplay.

(Source: Bangumi, translated)
data.background: Based on the online game League of Legends.
